title: Dragon Enchants
description: Adds powerful enchants which can be obtained by defeating the Ender Dragon!
body:
# DRAGON ENCHANTS
This is a datapack which adds a few enchants which can be obtained by defeating the Ender Dragon!

One book drops directly from the dragon and another drops by your feet.

## Available Enchants
- **Dragon Bore** - A more powerful version of Efficiency
  - Can be applied to Tools
- **Dragon Claws** - A universal and more powerful version of Sharpness
  - Can be applied to Swords, Axes, Tridents, Mace
- **Dragon Crush** - A universal and more powerful version of Breach
  - Can be applied to Swords, Axes, Tridents, Mace
- **Dragon Durability** - A stronger version of Unbreaking
  - Can be applied to anything that unbreaking can be applied to
- **Dragon Fire** - A universal and more powerful version of Fire Aspect. Applies a custom Dragon Flame debuff which deals 2 Magic Damage every 1.5 secs for 7.5 seconds
  - Can be applied to Swords, Axes, Tridents, Mace
- **Dragon Force** - A stronger version of Power
  - Can be applied to bows
- **Dragon Hide** - Combines All protection enchants and is more powerful
  - Can be applied to Armor and Elytra
- **Dragon Luck** - Grants +2 Luck
  - Can be applied to Armor and Elytra
- **Dragon Multi-Pierce** - 7-arrow Multishot in a tighter spread with 6 levels of Pierce
  - Can be applied to Crossbows
- **Dragon Spikes** - A stronger version of Thorns
  - Can be applied to Armor and Elytra
